textPlain: I'm reminded of how Carmack talked about the extra efficiencies available when targeting consoles, because you knew exactly what hardware was available.It's great that the efficiencies available can be shown to be extractable. The real, much harder, trick is putting together a sufficiently smart compiler to enable them for heterogeneous compute setups.
The demoscene also is an example of how much you can do if you can be absolutely sure exactly what hardware you’re running on.
Kind of. We like to call them grad students.
